mano_cua.result_summary: 当 slidesToShow=3 且实际幻灯片数为 3 时，轮播组件创建了 7 个多余的非克隆幻灯片（索引 3-9，cloned: false），应该不存在或标记为 cloned: true。Bug 确认复现
mano_cua.last_reasoning: When slidesToShow=3 equals the actual slide count (3), the carousel creates extra slides with indices 3-9 that are NOT marked as cloned (cloned: false). Expected: only indices 0,1,2 as non-cloned, pre/post clones should all be cloned: true. Observed: 7 extra non-cloned ghost slides. This confirms the bug where slidesToShow >= actual slides causes duplicate non-cloned slides.
